rationale: No new qualitative developments directly affecting Romania; Iran deal marginally positive for energy costs, war near border continues without escalation.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran settlement, markets surge
top_events.summary: Potential oil price relief from a US-Iran deal could ease energy costs for Romanian households, but deal remains unconfirmed and structural impact is limited.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active
top_events.summary: Confirmed El Niño raises risk of weather extremes in southeastern Europe including Romania; agricultural and water supply implications possible.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues
top_events.summary: No new escalation near Romania's border this cycle; Black Sea security situation unchanged.
